title: Friday Sermon 13 April 1984
description:
Humans are tested with fear, loss in fruits, loss of lives and loss of money, if fear is of Allah only then such fear is good news, but an attempt to create fear of the world is a test. Then there is the test of hunger, many countries faced this test during the World War, Muslims faced this test in Shib Abi Talib. There are uncountable developments for those who show patience, so one should never leave the state of piety and rather say 'To Allah we belong and to him we shall return' and step forward in all hardships. One person kept on praying for 30 years and his prayer was accepted after 30 years, this is the subject of prayer with patience. Glad tidings to those who show patience, glad tidings to those who bear hardships in the way of God.

The text https://www.alislam.org/urdu/pdf/Khutbat-e-Tahir-Vol-3-1984.pdf#page=207

Islamabad - Pakistan.
